reason: AP penetration 155.2 mm exceeded effective armor 18 mm.
notes: Range-adjusted AP penetration: 155.2 mm at 320 m from a base 168 mm with 4 mm loss per 100 m.
Generated 7 AP fragments from the penetration point.
Spread heuristic: AP keeps a narrow cone for core fragments and a wider lateral spread for secondary fragments; authored randomness 0.03 widens both slightly.
Energy heuristic: Core fragments use higher energy from penetration margin 137.2 mm; side/spall fragments are scaled down.
Reach heuristic: Core AP fragments travel deeper (roughly 3.3-4.7 m) while side/spall fragments fall off earlier (roughly 1.3-2.6 m).
Continuation heuristic: Core AP fragments may continue through one major interaction at reduced energy/reach; side and spall fragments stop after the first impact.
